intro.text: Heya!  I'm Nix Ni Arlan, airship pilot and navigator for the Angel's Sword Guild.
I'm off today, but I'm trying to make some money so... I'll take you anywhere you want.

dialogue.text: I love that feeling of the wind in your hair.  Airships are the best way to travel.
Obviously we would have to use leylines.... Magical Fuel Prices these days....
Our airship has upgraded engines from Sorthen, the best!
Never skimp out and buy Northi engines...
Oh! You noticed my name, "Ni Arlan".  My family is famous for airship engineers and helmsman.
The funny thing though... my mom is a Cannoneer!  She fought in the battle of Sorthen.
Why do I need money? Hmm... let's just say... I have very pricey expenses.
What? No!  I'm not buying Frixie Dust... geez....
My sister Mix is such a gearhead.  She always comes home covered in dirt and oil.
I'm not really much of a fighter, but my sister can really defend herself.
She's got a Divine Arms... and its quite strong.
I was supposed to take over the family engineering business but... I was a bit of a failure lets just say.
Yeah I fought in the four swords war.  I pulled some pretty crazy maneuvers then...
One time... I dove an airship straight into the mouth of a fiend to blast it with the buster cannon!  True story!
Airships are romantic... they can take you anywhere you want to go...
Leaflit?  Oh she's my best friend, we've been friends for a while.
